Part.Source: Event Start RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWFRETE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) RetornaAutorizacao.Call('FRETEFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &FRETEFECHAFINANCEIRO) RetornaAutorizacao.Call('FRETECANCELAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &FRETECANCELAFINANCEIRO) LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FRTDTAEMS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FRTDTAEMS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FRTDTAEMS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 1)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &FrtStsFin = nullvalue(&FrtStsFin) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = 'Monitora Fretes' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If &FrtDtaLct_To.IsEmpty() &FrtDtaLct_To = serverdate() &FrtDtaLct = &FrtDtaLct_To - 20 EndIF EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &IsSelecionar = false EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EliminarFrete = !'' If (FrtStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO) &EliminarFrete.Class = !'Attribute' Else &EliminarFrete.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &Update = !'' &Update.Link = newwpFrete.Link('UPD', EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod) &Status.FromImage(ActionDesce) &Status.TooltipText = "" &OqueFAzer.Clear() &OqueFAzer.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (FrtStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO and &FRETEFECHAFINANCEIRO > 0) &OqueFAzer.AddItem(1, 'Fechar Financeiro') Endif If (FrtStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO and &FRETECANCELAFINANCEIRO > 0) &OqueFAzer.AddItem(2, 'Cancelar Financeiro') Endif If &OqueFAzer.Count = 1 &OqueFAzer.Class = !'Invisible' Else &OqueFAzer.Class = !'Attribute' EndIf &Imprimir = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &IsSelecionar.Enabled = 1 if FrtStsFin = Status_Financeiro.FECHADO &IsSelecionar.Enabled = 0 &IsSelecionar= false EndIF Do Case Case FrtStsDoc.IsEmpty() &Status.FromImage(iconVerde) &Status.Tooltiptext = 'Frete Lançado corretamente!' Case Substr(FrtStsDoc,1,4) = 'ERRO' &Status.FromImage(iconVermelho) &Status.Tooltiptext = FrtStsDoc Otherwise &Status.FromImage(iconAmarelo) &Status.Tooltiptext = FrtStsDoc EndCase EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &EliminarFrete.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &EmpCod_Selected = EmpCod &FilCod_Selected = FilCod &FrtCod_Selected = FrtCod DVelop_ConfirmPanel_EliminarFrete.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_EliminarFrete.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_EliminarFrete.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do EliminarFrete' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &OqueFAzer.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &OqueFAzer = 1 Do 'Do FecharFinanceiro' Case &OqueFAzer = 2 Do 'Do CancelarFinanceiro' EndCase &OqueFAzer = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ newwpFrete.Call('INS', &Context.EmpCod, &FilCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoMarcar' For Each line in grid if FrtStsFin <> Status_Financeiro.FECHADO and FrtStsDoc.IsEmpty() &IsSelecionar = true EndIF EndFor /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoRelatorioFretes' RElConhecimentosFretes.Link() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoGerarFinanceiro' if &FRETEFECHAFINANCEIRO > 0 &IsErro = false &AuxFilCod = 0 &sdtPedidos.Clear() For Each line in grid if &IsSelecionar = true and FrtStsDoc.IsEmpty() if &AuxFilCod <> FilCod and &AuxFilCod <> 0 &IsErro = true Endif &AuxFilCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem = new() &sdtPedidosItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FilCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = FrtCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedDtaEms = FrtDtaLct &sdtPedidosItem.PedDtaFat = FrtDtaEms &sdtPedidosItem.PedDtaDsp = FrtDtaVct &sdtPedidosItem.PedCliCod = FrtTraCod &sdtPedidosItem.FrtDoc = FrtDoc &sdtPedidosItem.PedVlrLiq = FrtVlrTotFin &sdtPedidosItem.PedCliCodRaz = FrtTraCodRaz &planCod = FrtPlanCod do 'GetPlanoContas' &sdtPedidosItem.PlanHie = &planHie &sdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) EndiF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndFor if &IsErro = true msg('Para fechamento em grupo, selecione apenas Fretes de mesma Filial!') Else if &sdtPedidos.Count > 0 &WebSession.Set('CONFFECHAFRETE', &sdtPedidos.ToXml()) ConfFechaFrete.Popup(&AuxFilCod) Refresh Else msg('Nenhum Conhecimento selecionado!') EndiF Endif Else msg('Não autorizado a Fechar Financeiro de Fretes!') EndiF EndEvent Event 'DoExport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate Excel spreadsheet and download it. Do 'LoadGridState' ExportWWFrete.Call(&ExcelFilename, &ErrorMessage) If (&ExcelFilename <> "") Link(&ExcelFilename) Else msg(&ErrorMessage) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersFrtDtaEms1.Visible = False &FrtDoc1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FRTDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFrtDtaEms1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FRTDOC' &FrtDoc1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersFrtDtaEms2.Visible = False &FrtDoc2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FRTDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFrtDtaEms2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FRTDOC' &FrtDoc2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ TableMergedDynamicFiltersFrtDtaEms3.Visible = False &FrtDoc3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FRTDTAEMS' TableMergedDynamicFiltersFrtDtaEms3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FRTDOC' &FrtDoc3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FRTDTAEMS' &FrtDtaEms2.SetEmpty() &FrtDtaEms_To2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FRTDTAEMS' &FrtDtaEms3.SetEmpty() &FrtDtaEms_To3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do EliminarFrete' if FrtStsFin = Status_Financeiro.ABERTO EliminaLancamentoFrete.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod, &Context.UserName) Refresh Else msg('Frete com Financeiro Definido, não pode eliminar lançamento!') EndiF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do FecharFinanceiro' if &FRETEFECHAFINANCEIRO > 0 if FrtStsDoc.IsEmpty() &sdtPedidos.Clear() &AuxFilCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem = new() &sdtPedidosItem.EmpCod = EmpCod &sdtPedidosItem.FilCod = FilCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedCod = FrtCod &sdtPedidosItem.PedDtaEms = FrtDtaLct &sdtPedidosItem.PedDtaFat = FrtDtaEms &sdtPedidosItem.PedDtaDsp = FrtDtaVct &sdtPedidosItem.PedCliCod = FrtTraCod &sdtPedidosItem.FrtDoc = FrtDoc &sdtPedidosItem.PedVlrLiq = FrtVlrTotFin &sdtPedidosItem.PedCliCodRaz = FrtTraCodRaz &planCod = FrtPlanCod do 'GetPlanoContas' &sdtPedidosItem.PlanHie = &planHie &sdtPedidos.Add(&sdtPedidosItem) if &sdtPedidos.Count > 0 &WebSession.Set('CONFFECHAFRETE', &sdtPedidos.ToXml()) ConfFechaFrete.Popup(&AuxFilCod) Refresh Else msg('Nenhum Conhecimento selecionado!') EndiF Else msg('Frete não está lançado corretamente!') EndiF Else msg('Não autorizado a Fechar Financeiro de Fretes!') Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do CancelarFinanceiro' if &FRETECANCELAFINANCEIRO > 0 wpCancelaFrete.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod) refresh Else msg('Não autorizado a Cancelar Financeiro de Fretes!') Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FRTCOD" &FrtCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FRTSTSFIN" &FrtStsFin.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FRTTRACOD" &FrtTraCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FRTDTALCT" &FrtDtaLct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &FrtDtaLct_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FRTDTAEMS' &FrtDtaEms1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) &FrtDtaEms_To1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FRTDOC' &FrtDoc1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FRTCOD", "", not &FrtCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FrtCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FRTSTSFIN", "", not &FrtStsFin.IsEmpty(), 0, &FrtStsFin, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FRTTRACOD", "", not &FrtTraCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FrtTraCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FRTDTALCT", "", not (&FrtDtaLct.IsEmpty() AND &FrtDtaLct_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &FrtDtaLct.ToString().Trim(), &FrtDtaLct_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FRTDTAEMS' AND not (&FrtDtaEms1.IsEmpty() AND &FrtDtaEms_To1.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FrtDtaEms1.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FrtDtaEms_To1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'FRTDOC' AND not &FrtDoc1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FrtDoc1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FRTDTAEMS' AND not (&FrtDtaEms2.IsEmpty() AND &FrtDtaEms_To2.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FrtDtaEms2.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FrtDtaEms_To2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'FRTDOC' AND not &FrtDoc2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FrtDoc2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FRTDTAEMS' AND not (&FrtDtaEms3.IsEmpty() AND &FrtDtaEms_To3.IsEmpty()) &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FrtDtaEms3.ToString() &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo = &FrtDtaEms_To3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'FRTDOC' AND not &FrtDoc3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &FrtDoc3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.ValueTo.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Frete" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &Imprimir.Click RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS090.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, FrtCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndEvent Sub 'GetPlanoContas' For Each Order EmpCod, PlanCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where PlanCod = &planCod &planHie = PlanHie EndFor EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
